description: You are the Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!, active study: Phase II Diabetes Trial), schedule a Baseline Assessment for subject DM-101 (January 15, 2024, at 'Main Clinic') and a Week 4 Follow-up for subject DM-102 (March 1, 2024). Enroll a new subject DM-104 (Male, DOB: May 23, 1978) with today's enrollment date and schedule their Baseline Assessment for January 22, 2024. The study already has the Baseline Assessment and Week 4 Follow-up event definitions configured.
